verses.1: Why do you stand far off, LORD?
verses.2: In arrogance, the wicked hunt down the weak.
verses.3: For the wicked boasts of his heart’s cravings.
verses.4: The wicked, in the pride of his face,
verses.5: His ways are prosperous at all times.
verses.6: He says in his heart, “I shall not be shaken.
verses.7: His mouth is full of cursing, deceit, and oppression.
verses.8: He lies in wait near the villages.
verses.9: He lurks in secret as a lion in his ambush.
verses.11: He says in his heart, “God has forgotten.
verses.13: Why does the wicked person condemn God,
verses.14: But you do see trouble and grief.
verses.15: Break the arm of the wicked.
verses.16: The LORD is King forever and ever!
verses.17: LORD, you have heard the desire of the humble.
verses.18: to judge the fatherless and the oppressed,
